meta.title: 2017 SCADA Diva
meta.description:
The coveted SCADA Diva Pink Hardhat was passed from SCADA Diva 2016 Rob Lee to the new, 2017 SCADA Diva ... Michael Assante. 

Unfortunately Michael had left the event, but the video does include pictures of both SCADA Divas proudly wearing their crown.

The award speech was much too kind, in our opinion.
